Core_Mission_Values.Stated: PeopleGrove's mission is to help institutions strengthen outcomes for alumni and students by streamlining workflows, increasing engagement, and enabling scalable program growth. Core values include empathy, collaboration, and user-centric thinking. [Source: https://www.workingnomads.com/jobs/senior-product-manager-new-markets-peoplegrove-1549203; https://jobs.lever.co/peoplegrove/3b4a0026-c90c-497e-b09b-0d70310f9298]
Core_Mission_Values.Observed: Focus on B2B SaaS for higher education, emphasizing alumni relations, clinical experiential learning, and workflow tools. Strong emphasis on rapid product iteration and customer-driven enhancements. [Source: https://www.peoplegrove.com/about/careers/; https://jobright.ai/jobs/info/698d450cf64d441a164f4a7f]

Module_A_Company_DNA.Problem_Space: PeopleGrove solves pain points in higher education institutions by providing workflow and engagement tools for mission-critical programs like alumni relations management and clinical experiential learning. It streamlines operations, boosts engagement, and scales programs to improve student and alumni outcomes. [Source: https://www.workingnomads.com/jobs/senior-product-manager-new-markets-peoplegrove-1549203; https://jobright.ai/jobs/info/698d450cf64d441a164f4a7f]
Module_A_Company_DNA.Business_Model: B2B SaaS delivering workflow and engagement tools to higher education institutions. Revenue from subscriptions/software licensing. Rapidly growing stage, remote-first with US focus. Financial health not publicly detailed, but active hiring indicates growth. [Source: https://jobright.ai/jobs/info/698d450cf64d441a164f4a7f; https://www.peoplegrove.com/about/careers/]

JD_Analysis.Keywords: Product roadmap, user research (quant/qual), metrics/KPIs/A/B tests, cross-functional collaboration (Eng, Design, CS, Sales), customer discovery, B2B SaaS, growth/activation/retention, SQL/analytics.
JD_Analysis.Hidden_Success_Signals: Bias toward action, ruthless prioritization (impact/ROI), ownership from concept to launch, high velocity shipping, independence in ambiguity.

Preferred: Growth PM exp, SQL, higher ed/alumni experience, new market launches.
